metadata.title: States PCS: Odisha GK & General Studies for OPSC and other Odisha Exams

questions.question: Laterite soil is rich in?
questions.explanation: Laterite soil is rich in Iron and Aluminium.

questions.question: Hirakud dam is built over which river?
questions.explanation: Hirakud dam is situated over the Mahanadi river. The dam is 15 kilometers long and the length of the reservoir is 55 km. It is one of the largest dams in the World.

questions.question: Which lake of Odisha looks like the shape of Horse-shoe?
questions.explanation: Ansupa lake looks like a Horse-shoe shape. This lake is 5 km long and 1.6 km wide.

questions.question: Which among the following is/ are Kharif crops of Odisha?1. Paddy2. Maize3.Wheat4. GramChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: Timeline of Kharif season- Sowing time- June-July and harvesting time- September or October. Major Kharif crops of Odisha- Paddy, Jowar, Millets, Maize, Groundnut, Jute, Cotton, Pulses.

questions.question: Srimati, Priya, Prasant, Mukul are few common varieties of which crop?
questions.explanation: Srimati, Priya, Prasant, Mukul are few common varieties of Rice released by Central Rice Research Institute, Cuttack.

questions.question: What is the full form of the KALIA scheme which was launched by the Odisha government?

options.label: A
options.text: Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Agency

options.label: B
options.text: Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Augmentation

options.label: C
options.text: Krushak and Local area Investment Action

answer.label: B
answer.text: Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Augmentation

questions.explanation: KALIA stands for- Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Augmentation. It was launched by the Odisha government for farmer’s welfare.

questions.question: Which among the following is/ are the objectives of the Bhoochetana project which was implemented in Odisha?1. Soil health mapping2. Nutrient management recommendation3. Necessary treatmentChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: The Bhoochetana project was first implemented in Karnataka. Then it was launched in Odisha to help farmers by providing Soil analysis, nutrient management and taking necessary treatments.

questions.question: What is the main objective of Pani Panchayat in Odisha?

options.label: A
options.text: Optimum utilization of water as well as improving agricultural production

options.label: C
options.text: Implementation of new river valley project

answer.label: A
answer.text: Optimum utilization of water as well as improving agricultural production

questions.explanation: Pani Panchayat was introduced in the year 2002. Its primary objective is to ensure optimum utilization of water as well as improving agricultural production.

questions.question: The Kathagard- Dasmantpur is a breed of which animal?
questions.explanation: Some of the important breeds of the ship- Kuzi, Machkund strain, Kathagard- Dasmantpur, Dharamagarh

questions.question: Which of the following is/ are the main objectives of Rashtriya Gokul Mission?1. Development and conservation of indigenous breeds scientifically2. Improve milk production3. Disease-free Bulls distributionChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: Main objectives of Rashtriya Gokul Mission- Development and conservation of indigenous breeds scientifically, Improve milk production and productivity, Disease-free Bulls distribution for natural service.
